===================
===================
=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Eric Clapton
"Blackbushe"
Surrey, England
July 15, 1978

Beano 004 - Aud 3

Disc 1:

   1. The Core
   2. Worried Life Blues
   3. Wonderful Tonight
   4. Lay Down Sally
   5. Rodeo Man
   6. Fool's Paradise
   7. Cocaine
   8. Double Trouble

Disc 2:

   1. Nobody Knows You
   2. Badge
   3. Knockin' On Heaven's Door
   4. Key to the Highway
   5. Layla
   6. Bottle of Red Wine
   7. Forever Young (with Bob Dylan)

Band Lineup:
Eric Clapton	Guitar, Vocals
George Terry	Guitar
Carl Radle	Bass
Dick Sims	Keyboards
Jamie Oldaker	Drums
Marcy Levy	Vocals

Geetarz Comments:

This was the third and final show that EC headlined with Bob Dylan, and attended by over 200,000 people!

Lineage: Silver > CD-R (Secure Backup) > LiteOn iHAP322 > EAC v. 0.99 Prebeta 4 (Secure Mode, Offset Correct @ +6,0,24 bytes) > FLAC (Level 8) > You!

IMPORTANT NOTE: This is not a reseed of a previously torrented show!  There is another extant torrent of this release in circulation that has noise (extraction errors) in Disc 1, Track 1 between the 3 and 4 minute mark. Please note, this is a seperate, secure mode rip, and should not be confused with the other version. 

Artwork (scans by Geetarz @ 300DPI), checksums (ffp, MD5, ST5), EAC extraction logs, info file, and whole-torrent MD5 included.

Enjoy!

~Geetarz, October 2009

www.geetarz.org

Please join our group and keep informed:

http://launch.groups.yahoo.com/group/ClaptonBoots/
